title: column serving issue and other fixes
attempt to solve columndb issue + fix cgc with non-validator issue
Rebase fulu-ebps to unstable, add block error handling, remove incompatible tests

body: #6677 assigned blob fork code `MaxForksCount + 1` to Fulu, but this is already used for Electra. Update the logic to always base blobs relative to Deneb, in a maintenance-free way.
title: Fix incorrect getBlobForkCode for Fulu
patch in proposer lookahead fixes from berlinterop

body:
I am trying to compile nimbus ```v25.5.0``` on a Fedora 42, getting this error:


```
Building: install/usr/lib/libbacktrace.a
Building: install/usr/lib/libbacktracenim.a
Building: build/generate_makefile
Build completed successfully: build/generate_makefile
Building: build/nimbus_beacon_node
@["Unknown constants in file: ", "MAX_REQUEST_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS", "MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK_FULU", "NUMBER_OF_CUSTODY_GROUPS", "CUSTODY_REQUIREMENT", "MAX_REQUEST_PAYLOADS", "WHISK_PROPOSER_SELECTION_GAP", "WHISK_EPOCHS_PER_SHUFFLING_PHASE", "DATA_COLUMN_SIDECAR_SUBNET_COUNT", "SAMPLES_PER_SLOT", "MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS", "TARGET_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK_ELECTRA", "NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS"]
Terminated
make: *** [Makefile:441: nimbus_beacon_node] Terminated
```
 I compiled with
```
make clean
make update
make nimbus_beacon_node
```

Do you have any clue on what may be wrong, or how can I increase the log output to figure out where it is failing?
title: Compilation issues

body:
The gindex for Electra / Fulu when requesting `.graffiti` as proven property is incorrect:

- Electra: #6177 lacks reasoning and likely introduced copy paste error?
- Fulu: #6677 copied the broken Electra gindex, likely assuming its good

`BeaconBlockBody` has not changed. The correct gindex is still `18`.

- 13 fields total --> next pow2 is 16, so indexing starts at 16
- fields are 0-indexed, `graffiti` is at index 2
- 16 + 2 = 18
title: Fix Electra / Fulu .graffiti proven property in remote keystore
fix upgrade to fulu for future beta2 tests

body: Makes Electra and Fulu (and any non-mainnet fork) optional to the parser
title: fix: pass `optionalForks` to consensus fork parser
make `getTargetGossipState` aware of Fulu + other fixes
clean up eip7594 naming, useful links, test suite naming

body:
implements https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/dev/specs/_features/eip7594/p2p-interface.md#metadata

conditionally calls getMetaData v2 or v3 by checking if `FULU_FORK_EPOCH` is scheduled or not.
title: `getMetaData_v3`
